task_completion.description: Open the specification sheet to read the required dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer open showing the contents of 'bracket_specification.txt' from the desktop, displaying dimensions for the bracket.

task_completion.description: Open the initial unconstrained bracket sketch in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application window is open with 'bracket_start.slvs' loaded, displaying an unconstrained L-shaped sketch.

task_completion.description: Apply the horizontal arm length constraint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance constraint dimension of '85.0' (or within 0.5mm tolerance) is visible on the horizontal arm of the L-bracket within the SolveSpace canvas.

task_completion.description: Apply the vertical arm height constraint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance constraint dimension of '60.0' (or within 0.5mm tolerance) is visible on the vertical arm of the L-bracket within the SolveSpace canvas.
A distance constraint dimension of '10.0' (or within 0.5mm tolerance) is visible on the thickness of the L-bracket arms within the SolveSpace canvas.

task_completion.description: Save the fully defined sketch to the required file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title changes to 'bracket_constrained.slvs', a 'Save As' dialog shows this filename in '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/', or a file manager shows the new file in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace graphical interface to apply constraints.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking constraint tools in the SolveSpace UI or using SolveSpace keyboard shortcuts, rather than using a terminal script to generate the file.

integrity.description: Constraints are genuine SolveSpace dimension objects.
integrity.visual_evidence: Dimensions should appear as native SolveSpace constraint labels (typically with dimension lines/arrows), not as plain text overlaid on the screen or drawn with a generic image editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the .slvs file source code.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not have 'bracket_start.slvs' or 'bracket_constrained.slvs' open in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type in constraint data arrays.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification file 'bracket_specification.txt' dictates three required dimensions: horizontal arm length = 85.0mm, vertical arm height = 60.0mm, and arm thickness = 10.0mm (all with a 0.5mm tolerance). The agent must use SolveSpace to apply these three distance constraints to 'bracket_start.slvs' and save the result exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/bracket_constrained.slvs'.
